BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Garden club treasury break-even analysis for spring 2026 plant sale planning. Prepared for board review.
BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is approximately 12 active members at current cost structure. At 24 members the club has comfortable headroom. Primary revenue driver is the annual spring plant sale.
ActionItems: Confirm Community Center venue rental rate for 2026
Review spring plant sale revenue projections with board in March
Revisit after year-end with full actuals

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate. Plant sale revenue is seasonal; averaged over 12 months for monthly figures.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Venue rental increases from $60 to $75/month
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $205 + $15 increase = $220. At $20/member/year (~$1.67/month), 12 members minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Manageable. Well within buffer at 24 members and plant sale revenue.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Venue rental increases to $100/month (unlikely)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still manageable. Plant sale would cover shortfall easily.
